mapper.select:
SELECT A.USER_CD AS userCd, A.BRNM AS brnm, A.NAME AS name, A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AS approvalDivCd, A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AS approvalReqId, A.REQ_DATE AS reqDate, A.APPROVAL_REQ_REASON AS approvalReqReason, (SELECT APPROVAL_DATE FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=1) AS firstApprovalDate, (SELECT APPROVAL_LINE_USER_NM FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=1) AS firstApprovalLineUserNm, (SELECT APPROVAL_YN FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=1) AS firstApprovalYn, (SELECT CASE WHEN APPROVAL_YN = 'Y' THEN '결재' WHEN APPROVAL_YN = 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '대기' END FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=1) AS firstApprovalYnNm, (SELECT APPROVAL_REJECT_DOCU FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=1) AS firstApprovalRejectDocu,
(SELECT APPROVAL_DATE FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=2) AS secondApprovalDate, (SELECT APPROVAL_LINE_USER_NM FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=2) AS secondApprovalLineUserNm, (SELECT APPROVAL_YN FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=2) AS secondApprovalYn, (SELECT CASE WHEN APPROVAL_YN = 'Y' THEN '결재' WHEN APPROVAL_YN = 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '대기' END FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=2) AS secondApprovalYnNm, (SELECT APPROVAL_REJECT_DOCU FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=2) AS secondApprovalRejectDocu,
(SELECT APPROVAL_DATE FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=3) AS thirdApprovalDate, (SELECT APPROVAL_LINE_USER_NM FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=3) AS thirdApprovalLineUserNm, (SELECT APPROVAL_YN FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=3) AS thirdApprovalYn, (SELECT CASE WHEN APPROVAL_YN = 'Y' THEN '결재' WHEN APPROVAL_YN = 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '대기' END FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=3) AS thirdApprovalYnNm, (SELECT APPROVAL_REJECT_DOCU FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE B.USER_CD = A.USER_CD AND B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX=3) AS thirdApprovalRejectDocu, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_BULK_JOB_REQ B WHERE B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.file_url is not null) AS bulkCnt FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ A WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(A.USER_CD) LIKE UPPER(#{userCd})
AND A.REQ_DATE >= #{start}
AND A.REQ_DATE <= #{end}
ORDER BY A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID

SELECT DISTINCT(USER_CD) AS userCd, NAME AS userNm FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ WHERE 1=1
AND USER_CD = #{userCd}

SELECT A.USER_CD AS userCd, A.NAME AS userNm, A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AS approvalDivCd, A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AS approvalReqId, A.REQ_DATE AS reqDate, A.APPROVAL_REQ_REASON AS approvalReqReason, A.PROGRAM_ID AS programId, A.PROGRAM_NM AS programNm, A.BRC AS brc, A.BRNM AS brnm, A.OFT_C AS oftC, A.OFT AS oft, A.IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, A.AUTH AS auth, A.COM_CD AS comCd, A.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate, B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_ID AS approvalLineUserId, B.APPROVAL_DATE AS approvalDate, B.APPROVAL_YN AS approvalYn, B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX AS approvalLineIndex, B.APPROVAL_REJECT_DOCU AS approvalRejectDocu, B.APPROVAL_REQ_DOCU AS approvalReqDocu, B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_NM AS approvalLineUserNm, CASE WHEN B.APPROVAL_YN = 'Y' THEN '승인' WHEN B.APPROVAL_YN = 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '' END AS approvalYnNm FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ A, mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE 1=1 AND A.USER_CD = B.USER_CD AND A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD = B.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AND A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.BEFORE_APPLY_YN = 'Y' AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_ID = #{approverUserCd} ORDER BY A.REQ_DATE DESC, A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID DESC

SELECT A.USER_CD AS userCd, A.NAME AS userNm, A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AS approvalDivCd, A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AS approvalReqId, A.REQ_DATE AS reqDate, A.APPROVAL_REQ_REASON AS approvalReqReason, A.PROGRAM_ID AS programId, A.PROGRAM_NM AS programNm, A.BRC AS brc, A.BRNM AS brnm, A.OFT_C AS oftC, A.OFT AS oft, A.IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, A.AUTH AS auth, A.COM_CD AS comCd, A.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate, B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_ID AS approvalLineUserId, B.APPROVAL_DATE AS approvalDate, B.APPROVAL_YN AS approvalYn, B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX AS approvalLineIndex, B.APPROVAL_REJECT_DOCU AS approvalRejectDocu, B.APPROVAL_REQ_DOCU AS approvalReqDocu, B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_NM AS approvalLineUserNm, CASE WHEN B.APPROVAL_YN = 'Y' THEN '승인' WHEN B.APPROVAL_YN = 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '' END AS approvalYnNm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_BULK_JOB_REQ C WHERE C.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND C.file_url is not null ) AS bulkCnt FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ A, mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE 1=1 AND A.USER_CD = B.USER_CD AND A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD = B.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AND A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.BEFORE_APPLY_YN = 'Y' AND B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX = 3 ORDER BY A.REQ_DATE DESC, A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID DESC

SELECT A.USER_CD AS userCd, A.NAME AS userNm, A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AS approvalDivCd, A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AS approvalReqId, A.REQ_DATE AS reqDate, A.APPROVAL_REQ_REASON AS approvalReqReason, A.PROGRAM_ID AS programId, A.PROGRAM_NM AS programNm, A.BRC AS brc, A.BRNM AS brnm, A.OFT_C AS oftC, A.OFT AS oft, A.IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, A.AUTH AS auth, A.COM_CD AS comCd, A.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate, B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_ID AS approvalLineUserId, B.APPROVAL_DATE AS approvalDate, B.APPROVAL_YN AS approvalYn, B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX AS approvalLineIndex, B.APPROVAL_REJECT_DOCU AS approvalRejectDocu, B.APPROVAL_REQ_DOCU AS approvalReqDocu, B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_NM AS approvalLineUserNm, CASE WHEN B.APPROVAL_YN = 'Y' THEN '승인' WHEN B.APPROVAL_YN = 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '' END AS approvalYnNm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_BULK_JOB_REQ C WHERE C.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND C.file_url is not null ) AS bulkCnt FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ A, mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE 1=1 AND A.USER_CD = B.USER_CD AND A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD = B.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AND A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND B.BEFORE_APPLY_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.REQ_DATE DESC, A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID DESC

SELECT USER_CD AS userCd, REQ_DATE AS reqDate, APPROVAL_REQ_ID AS approvalReqId, USER_NM AS userNm, PROGRAM_ID AS programId, PROGRAM_NM AS programNm, PROC_DATE AS procDate FROM mhdb.TB_MASK_HISTORY WHERE 1=1
AND REQ_DATE >= #{start}::date
AND REQ_DATE <= #{end}::date
ORDER BY REQ_DATE

SELECT USER_CD , APPROVAL_DIV_CD , APPROVAL_REQ_ID , NAME , BRC , BRNM , BUSSINESS_NM , IP_ADDRESS , APPROVAL_REQ_REASON , REQ_DATE , AUTH , EXPIRE_DATE , APPROVAL_DATE , PROGRAM_ID , PROGRAM_NM , OFT_C , OFT , COM_CD FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ WHERE 1=1 AND APPROVAL_REQ_ID = #{approvalReqId}
